// SlowQueryThresholdMs: Part 7: commands slower than this (ms) are logged at Warning. Production keeps a sensible 100ms floor.
// Jwt: Auth signing config. Issuer/Audience are safe to commit; the Key is a SECRET and MUST be overridden out-of-band (dotnet user-secrets, or env var Jwt__Key) in any real environment. appsettings.Development.json supplies a throwaway local key so `dotnet run` works for the assignment. Key must be >= 32 chars (256-bit) for HMAC-SHA256.

ConnectionStrings.// DefaultConnection: Part 9 PRODUCTION pool. Maximum Pool Size=30 derived from: max_connections=100, reserve 10 for admin/monitoring -> 90 usable / 3 app instances = 30 per instance. Minimum Pool Size=5 keeps warm connections so the first requests after a quiet period skip TCP+TLS+auth cold start.
